Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Fern Hunt.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nedra Franklin is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Player representing the defendant through full scope.

Counsel and litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-09-2012 is vacated.
